mission: Create the authoritative ShopiFixer Fulfillment Truth Model audit.

source_files_inspected.notes: Contains client lifecycle, deal payment status, ShopiFixer audit/fix status, business revenue, and next action.
recordVerifiedStripePayment records verified payment as paid/deal_won and sets next_action.type to fix.
Tracks revenue/outreach funnel truth, not ShopiFixer fulfillment delivery state.
Shows one ShopiFixer delivery-like open unit waiting for payment, but is stale relative to current client truth.
Reads client truth and revenue gaps; not a fulfillment authority.
Synthesizes fulfillment counts from client registry and marks proof/review/referral fields unavailable.
Contains 1494 lead events; supports lead history, not fulfillment.
Contains a ShopiFixer delivery unit waiting_for_payment with proof_required true and proof_status not_started.
Defines required paid sprint artifacts and completion rules.
Defines intended packet fields for intake, scope, proof, execution, and completion.
Contains proof governance mostly for send/Abando proof, not a completed paid ShopiFixer proof package.
Scans for proof evidence; does not establish a completed paid ShopiFixer fulfillment proof package.
Abando-oriented proof loop; not a ShopiFixer paid sprint proof package.
Contains checkout optimization packets, but no live paid ShopiFixer fulfillment packet with execution/proof/completion complete.
Contains a rendered audit surface from scorecards; useful for audit presentation, not fulfillment.

1_fulfillment_truth_already_exists.truth: ShopiFixer lead identity, routing, engagement, and lead lifecycle state.
1_fulfillment_truth_already_exists.limits: Lead truth only; does not track paid fulfillment.

1_fulfillment_truth_already_exists.truth: Coarse client lifecycle, audit status, payment status, and ShopiFixer fix status.
1_fulfillment_truth_already_exists.limits: No scoped fix, delivery execution, QA, proof package, approval, case study, or referral state.

1_fulfillment_truth_already_exists.truth: Verified Stripe payment can be written into client truth as paid/deal_won.
1_fulfillment_truth_already_exists.limits: Payment propagation is not fulfillment execution.

1_fulfillment_truth_already_exists.truth: A delivery-shaped ShopiFixer unit exists with waiting_for_payment and proof_required.
1_fulfillment_truth_already_exists.limits: Not tied to a verified paid engagement and not authoritative.

2_proof_truth_already_exists.truth: Defines required sprint artifacts: intake summary, fix scope, before evidence, execution notes, after evidence, proof package, completion decision.
2_proof_truth_already_exists.limits: Authority only; no live paid proof package instance.

2_proof_truth_already_exists.truth: Defines intended fields for payment, execution, proof, completion, and merchant-facing proof summary.
Proof governance exists for runtime proof categories.
2_proof_truth_already_exists.limits: Does not prove a completed paid ShopiFixer sprint.
Not a ShopiFixer paid sprint proof package.

3_paid_shopifixer_customer_trackable_fro.reason: Payment can be mirrored into client truth, but there is no authoritative paid fulfillment object carrying delivery, proof, approval, case study, and referral state.

work_not_started.notes: Current values show not_started/waiting_for_payment, but not through a single fulfillment authority.

work_in_progress.notes: Modeled and counted, current observed count is 0, but no live proof-backed fulfillment object owns the state.

awaiting_proof.notes: Proof requirement exists, but no governed awaiting_proof state exists for paid ShopiFixer fulfillment.

awaiting_client_approval.notes: No canonical client approval or acceptance field found.

completed.notes: Completion is modeled, but no live paid completed fulfillment packet was found.

5_missing: verified paid engagement identity inside a fulfillment object
fulfillment packet identity tied to payment and client
field source notes for synthesized and unavailable values

why_closest_source_is_not_authoritative: stale relative to current client registry
no case study or referral state
6_single_authoritative_fulfillment_objec.authority_defined_object: ShopiFixer fulfillment packet JSON with payment, execution, proof, and completion states

7_smallest_repair.summary: Add a canonical ShopiFixer fulfillment truth object and materializer that reads existing truth without overwriting commercial or lifecycle truth.
first_slice: Materialize records from client registry, delivery units, fulfillment authority/template, and packet registry when bindable.
Mark missing proof, QA, approval, case study, and referral fields unavailable until runtime writers prove them.

engagement_trace.notes: Audit fields and audit surface exist, but not every lead/client has a completed audit.
Verified payment writeback exists, but current client truth shows 0 paid ShopiFixer clients.
Delivery model and authority exist, but no authoritative paid fulfillment object exists.
Proof requirements exist; no completed paid ShopiFixer proof package was found.
No canonical case study eligibility/status object was found.
Referral authority exists after proof and satisfaction, but no runtime writer or state object was found.
